falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the current hold signal and suggest a reversal of the bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds the 90th percentile of historical volume by 50% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a blowoff top, invalidating the current hold and suggesting a reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: Major exchange delists the asset, causing a 20% price drop within 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A delisting event would create a clear catalyst disproving the current hold signal and indicating a false bottom

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
